description: PMD JavaScript (ECMAScript) AST Nodes - Complete Reference
note: Includes inherited attributes from parent classes (marked with inherited_from field)

attributes.name: @IsFunctionNodeName
attributes.description: Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration.

attributes.name: @IsFunctionNodeParameter
attributes.description: Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration. public boolean isFunctionNodeName() { return getParent() instanceof ASTFunctionNode && ((ASTFunctionNode) getParent()).getFunctionName() == this; } / Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration parameter.

attributes.name: @IsFunctionCallName
attributes.description: Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration. public boolean isFunctionNodeName() { return getParent() instanceof ASTFunctionNode && ((ASTFunctionNode) getParent()).getFunctionName() == this; } / Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration parameter. public boolean isFunctionNodeParameter() { if (getParent() instanceof ASTFunctionNode) { ASTFunctionNode functionNode = (ASTFunctionNode) getParent(); for (int i = 0; i < functionNode.getNumParams(); i++) { if (functionNode.getParam(i) == this) { return true; } } } return false; } / Returns whether this name node is the name of a function call.

attributes.name: @IsVariableDeclaration
attributes.description: Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration. public boolean isFunctionNodeName() { return getParent() instanceof ASTFunctionNode && ((ASTFunctionNode) getParent()).getFunctionName() == this; } / Returns whether this name node is the name of a function declaration parameter. public boolean isFunctionNodeParameter() { if (getParent() instanceof ASTFunctionNode) { ASTFunctionNode functionNode = (ASTFunctionNode) getParent(); for (int i = 0; i < functionNode.getNumParams(); i++) { if (functionNode.getParam(i) == this) { return true; } } } return false; } / Returns whether this name node is the name of a function call. public boolean isFunctionCallName() { return getParent() instanceof ASTFunctionCall && ((ASTFunctionCall) getParent()).getTarget() == this; } / Returns whether this name node is the name of a variable declaration.

attributes.name: @IsInaccurate
attributes.description: Checks if this number literal cannot be represented exactly without loss as a JavaScript Number. The number is either too big or uses too many decimal places.
